text.title: Accessibility Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes by axe-critical + keyboard + contrast to a rule in 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: verdict=fail; must-fix every critical before re-run
verdict=fail; fix focus order + visible focus + remove traps
verdict=fail; raise ratios above WCAG AA
verdict=fail; replace div onclick with semantic element
verdict=pass; ship pending serious-axe remediation plan

text.example: axe_critical=0 → keyboard_ok=true → contrast_ok=true → semantic_ok=true → conclusion aria-as-last-resort → verdict=pass.
